title: pgclone 4.0.0 released
description:
pgclone v4.0.0: Native SQL-Based Database Cloning and Data Masking
Baku, Azerbaijan — April 22, 2026
I am pleased to announce the release of pgclone version 4.0.0, a
PostgreSQL extension that clones databases, schemas, and objects directly via
SQL. I

description:

title: credcheck v4.7 has been released
description:
Antananarivo, Madagascar - April 19, 2026
PostgreSQL credcheck extension
The credcheck PostgreSQL extension provides few general credential checks, which will be evaluated during the user creation, during the password change and user renaming. By usi

title: pg_dbms_job v2.0 released
description:
Antananarivo, Madagascar - April 19, 2026
PostgreSQL DBMS_JOB compatibility extension
pg_dbms_job is a new PostgreSQL extension to create, manage and use Oracle-style DBMS_JOB scheduled job. The use and behavior is just like with the DBMS_JOB Oracle

title: PGConf.EU 2026 Announced – Call for Community Day Event Proposals Now Open
description:

title: Apache Cloudberry 2.1.0 Released: PostgreSQL-Based MPP Database for Analytics & AI Workloads
description:
The Apache Cloudberry (Incubating) community is pleased to announce the release of Apache Cloudberry 2.1.0, the latest version of its massively parallel processing (MPP) database designed for large-scale analytics and AI workloads.

title: PGDay Armenia 2026 Schedule & Registration!
description:
Hey everyone!
The PGDay Armenia 2026 schedule is now live, and Early Bird tickets are officially on sale!
Join us for the first-ever PostgreSQL conference in Armenia on April 30, in-person in Yerevan.
Get your ticket now: https://pgdayarmenia.com/#ge

title: PGConf.BE : Preliminary schedule, registrations open and speakers online
description:
PGConf.BE 2026 will be held in Haasrode, Leuven, about 25km from Brussels.
The conference will take place on May 5th, 2026. Registrations are open.
The speakers and their sessions are available, as well as the preliminary schedule.
See you in Leuven

title: dotConnect for PostgreSQL 9.1: New Release
description:
Devart rolled out the new version of dotConnect for PostgreSQL with EF Core 10, AI Vector Types, and Expanded Database Compatibility. 
The list of enhancements:

Support for Entity Framework Core 10
Added support for pgvector VECTOR and HALFVEC data
